description: Triggers when setting up project automation: Husky pre-commit hooks, GitHub Actions CI/CD, n8n monitoring workflows, or quality check scripts for client projects
should_trigger: Set up Husky pre-commit hooks with ESLint and TypeScript for my Next.js project
Create a GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline that runs lint, typecheck, and Lighthouse tests
Add an n8n monitoring workflow to check uptime every 6 hours for my client site
Configure lint-staged to run ESLint and Prettier before every commit
Set up the 4-layer automation system for a new Pixarts client project
Add npm scripts for check, check:fix, and check:ci to my package.json
should_not_trigger: Create a Next.js component for a contact form
Write unit tests for my React hooks
Configure n8n to send a lead notification email
